sample_requests: Run Wilcoxon, pyDESeq2, and ANCOM-BC on Early-vs-Late at the genus level and report the 3-way Venn at FDR 0.05
Pick a single DA method for an n=12/group cohort with high zero-inflation
Build the consensus hit set (intersection across all three methods) and the Wilcoxon ∩ ANCOM-BC defensible set
Diagnose why a DESeq2 hit doesn't appear in Wilcoxon -- likely an NB-shrinkage artefact on a low-prevalence feature
Compare DA results at FDR/q < 0.05 across methods on the mothur SOP cohort and explain disagreements

validation_budget.skip_reason: Source-grounded via inspect.signature / inspect.getdoc and direct reads of omicverse/micro/_da.py. The mothur SOP DA-comparison demo would serve as the future smoke target; no live smoke run executed.
